title: Python Program Execution Flow on Raspberry Pi
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of writing, executing, and interacting with a Python program on a Raspberry Pi for an IoT application.
elements: Code saved to Raspberry Pi (e.g., script.py)
relationships: Code is written and saved as a file
User or system command runs the Python interpreter on the file
Interpreter uses GPIO library to send/receive signals
GPIO pins are physically connected to sensors and actuators
Program processes input and creates an output or stores data

visuals.title: Programming Raspberry Pi With Python
visuals.description: Python to Hardware Flow - covering code-to-hardware pipeline from Python script through RPi.GPIO library to GPIO pins and physical output
